settings.label: OUR STORY
settings.heading: Welcome Back to Dairy.
settings.body_text:
Life's best moments often happen around food. A first date over coffee and tiramisu. A childhood birthday party with pizza and ice cream. A family gathering where someone's famous mac and cheese takes center stage.

But for millions of Americans dealing with lactose sensitivity, these moments come with anxiety about what comes next. We started DairyAssure with a simple belief: you shouldn't have to choose between comfort and enjoyment.

Our answer is radically simple. Pure, single-ingredient lactase powder. No preservatives. No fillers. No compromise. Just the enzyme your body needs, working quietly in the background so you can focus on what matters.

settings.question: What exactly is DairyAssure?
settings.answer: A pure lactase enzyme powder that helps your body digest dairy. One ingredient, no fillers, no preservatives. Just sprinkle it on your food or mix it into your drink.

settings.question: How do I use it?
settings.answer: Sprinkle it on your food or mix it into your drink right before you eat. That's it. No pills to swallow, no timing to worry about.

settings.question: Is DairyAssure safe for children?
settings.answer: Yes. DairyAssure is a single-ingredient powder suitable for children, adults, and seniors. It simply supplements the lactase enzyme your body doesn't produce enough of.

settings.question: What makes it different from pills?
settings.answer: Pills are loaded with fillers and preservatives — stuff your body doesn't need (and that can cause its own stomach issues). DairyAssure is just the enzyme, in powder form, so you can add it directly to food without planning ahead.

settings.question: How long does it last?
settings.answer: DairyAssure provides 90+ minutes of effectiveness — enough to last through your entire meal and beyond.

settings.question: Can I use it with any dairy product?
settings.answer: Yes. Coffee, pizza, ice cream, cheese, yogurt, protein shakes — DairyAssure works with all dairy. It's completely flavorless, so it won't change the taste of your food.

settings.question: Is it really just one ingredient?
settings.answer: Yes. DairyAssure contains only lactase — the enzyme your body needs to digest dairy. Nothing else. No preservatives, no fillers, no additives, no artificial flavors.

settings.text: I brought DairyAssure to Italy. Gelato every day. Zero issues. This is hands-down the best lactose solution I've tried.
